# HELP is_bursts_total Input bursts synthesized.
# TYPE is_bursts_total counter
is_bursts_total 240010
# HELP is_synth_seconds Synthesis latency.
# TYPE is_synth_seconds summary
is_synth_seconds{quantile="0.5"} 0.012
is_synth_seconds{quantile="0.99"} 0.087
is_synth_seconds_sum 4.2
is_synth_seconds_count 305
